description:
Offered: Day course offered every other year.
This course studies culture, science and social developments as well as domestic and international politics from the first World War to the present.
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200 or HIST 1000 or HIST 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500 or AMST 1800
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, DP, HI
prerequisites: ENGL 1200 or HIST 1000 or HIST 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500 or AMST 1800
